proposed_hypotheses.text: Among all patients, treatment_pembrolizumab is associated with a higher rate of objective_response than no pembrolizumab.
Among all patients, treatment_sotorasib is associated with a higher rate of objective_response than no sotorasib.
Among all patients, treatment_olaparib is associated with a higher rate of objective_response than no olaparib.
Among all patients, treatment_osimertinib is associated with a higher rate of objective_response than no osimertinib.

analyses.result_summary: ORR 0.1739 on treatment_pembrolizumab=1 vs 0.1640 on treatment_pembrolizumab=0; OR=1.073, Fisher p=0.00332.
ORR 0.1695 on treatment_sotorasib=1 vs 0.1687 on treatment_sotorasib=0; OR=1.006, Fisher p=0.822.
ORR 0.1699 on treatment_olaparib=1 vs 0.1685 on treatment_olaparib=0; OR=1.010, Fisher p=0.715.
ORR 0.1655 on treatment_osimertinib=1 vs 0.1704 on treatment_osimertinib=0; OR=0.965, Fisher p=0.18.

proposed_hypotheses.text: In patients with egfr_mutation=1, treatment_osimertinib is associated with a higher rate of objective_response than no osimertinib.
In patients with egfr_mutation=0, treatment_osimertinib has no benefit on objective_response.
There is a positive multiplicative interaction between treatment_osimertinib and egfr_mutation on objective_response (logit scale).

analyses.result_summary: EGFR+ subset (n=6517): ORR 0.1637 osimertinib vs 0.1657 no osimertinib; OR=0.986, p=0.856.
EGFR- subset (n=43483): ORR 0.1657 osimertinib vs 0.1711 no osimertinib; OR=0.962, p=0.171.

proposed_hypotheses.text: In patients with kras_g12c=1, treatment_sotorasib is associated with a higher rate of objective_response than no sotorasib.
In patients with kras_g12c=0, treatment_sotorasib has no association with objective_response.
There is a positive multiplicative interaction between treatment_sotorasib and kras_g12c on objective_response.

analyses.result_summary: KRAS G12C+ subset (n=6368): ORR 0.1745 sotorasib vs 0.1664; OR=1.059, p=0.421.
KRAS G12C- subset (n=43632): ORR 0.1687 sotorasib vs 0.1690; OR=0.998, p=0.947.

proposed_hypotheses.text: In patients with brca2_mutation=1, treatment_olaparib is associated with a higher rate of objective_response than no olaparib.
In patients with brca2_mutation=0, treatment_olaparib has no effect on objective_response.
There is a positive multiplicative interaction between treatment_olaparib and brca2_mutation on objective_response.

analyses.result_summary: BRCA2+ subset (n=1519): ORR 0.1463 olaparib vs 0.1679; OR=0.849, p=0.349.
BRCA2- subset (n=48481): ORR 0.1706 olaparib vs 0.1686; OR=1.014, p=0.597.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher pdl1_tps is associated with higher objective_response rate among pembrolizumab-treated patients.
There is a positive multiplicative interaction between treatment_pembrolizumab and pdl1_tps on objective_response.
Patients with pdl1_tps>=0.5 (high PD-L1) treated with pembrolizumab have higher objective_response than high-PD-L1 patients without pembrolizumab.

analyses.result_summary: Interaction coef=0.5908 per unit pdl1_tps; LR p=1.55e-07.

proposed_hypotheses.text: In tmb_high=1 patients, pembrolizumab yields higher objective_response than non-pembrolizumab; interaction is positive.
In stk11_mutation=1 patients, pembrolizumab benefit on objective_response is reduced (negative interaction) vs stk11_mutation=0.
In keap1_mutation=1 patients, pembrolizumab benefit on objective_response is reduced (negative interaction) vs keap1_mutation=0.

analyses.result_summary: tmb_high+ (n=14258): pembro ORR 0.1967 vs 0.1672, OR=1.220 p=5.1e-06. tmb_high- (n=35742): pembro ORR 0.1648 vs 0.1627, OR=1.015 p=0.607. Interaction log-OR=0.184, LR p=0.000411.
stk11_mutation+ (n=7451): pembro ORR 0.1578 vs 0.1729, OR=0.896 p=0.0808. stk11_mutation- (n=42549): pembro ORR 0.1767 vs 0.1625, OR=1.106 p=9.54e-05. Interaction log-OR=-0.211, LR p=0.00178.
keap1_mutation+ (n=8418): pembro ORR 0.1712 vs 0.1681, OR=1.022 p=0.727. keap1_mutation- (n=41582): pembro ORR 0.1744 vs 0.1632, OR=1.083 p=0.00228. Interaction log-OR=-0.058, LR p=0.363.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher ecog_ps (worse performance status) is associated with lower objective_response rate.
stage_iv=1 (metastatic) is associated with lower objective_response rate than stage_iv=0.
has_brain_mets=1 is associated with lower objective_response rate than has_brain_mets=0.

analyses.result_summary: has_brain_mets=1 ORR 0.1436 vs has_brain_mets=0 0.1775; OR=0.777, p=6.12e-19.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher albumin_g_dl is associated with higher objective_response rate.
Higher ldh_u_l is associated with lower objective_response rate.
Higher nlr is associated with lower objective_response rate.
Higher crp_mg_l is associated with lower objective_response rate.
Greater weight_loss_pct_6mo is associated with lower objective_response rate.
Squamous histology has different objective_response than adenocarcinoma overall.
Among pembrolizumab-treated patients, ever-smokers have higher objective_response than never-smokers.
There is a positive interaction between treatment_pembrolizumab and ever-smoker status (smoking_status != 'never') on objective_response.

analyses.result_summary: squamous ORR 0.1737 vs adenocarcinoma 0.1671; OR=1.048, p=0.0765.
Among pembro-treated, ever-smoker ORR 0.1755 vs never-smoker 0.1644; OR=1.082, p=0.102.

proposed_hypotheses.text: liver_mets=1 is associated with lower objective_response rate than liver_mets=0.
bone_mets=1 is associated with lower objective_response rate than bone_mets=0.
adrenal_mets=1 is associated with lower objective_response rate than adrenal_mets=0.
pleural_effusion=1 is associated with lower objective_response rate.
alk_fusion=1 patients have a different objective_response rate than alk_fusion=0.
Within egfr_mutation=1, treatment_osimertinib drives objective_response (lower without osimertinib).
tp53_mutation=1 is associated with lower objective_response rate than tp53_mutation=0.
msi_high=1 is associated with higher objective_response rate than msi_high=0.

analyses.result_summary: Within EGFR+ (n=6517): ORR osimertinib 0.1637 vs no osimertinib 0.1657; OR=0.986, p=0.856.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher age_years is negatively associated with objective_response.
sex_female=1 is associated with different objective_response than sex_female=0.
insurance_type is associated with differences in objective_response.
rural_residence=1 is associated with lower objective_response rate.
race_ethnicity is associated with differences in objective_response.

analyses.result_summary: rural_residence=1 ORR 0.1666 vs urban 0.1695; OR=0.979, p=0.491.

proposed_hypotheses.text: interstitial_lung_disease_history=1 is associated with lower objective_response.
autoimmune_disease=1 is associated with different objective_response.
chronic_kidney_disease=1 is associated with lower objective_response.
depression_anxiety_diagnosis=1 is associated with lower objective_response.
copd=1 is associated with lower objective_response.
Higher fatigue_grade is associated with lower objective_response.
Higher pain_nrs is associated with lower objective_response.
Higher dyspnea_grade is associated with lower objective_response.
Higher appetite_loss_grade is associated with lower objective_response.
More prior_lines_of_therapy is associated with lower objective_response.
prior_immunotherapy=1 is associated with lower objective_response.
prior_chemotherapy=1 is associated with lower objective_response.
prior_targeted_therapy=1 is associated with lower objective_response.
After adjustment for ECOG, stage_iv, brain mets, age, sex, albumin, LDH, NLR, CRP, the EGFR+ x osimertinib interaction remains positive and significant.
After the same adjustment, KRAS G12C+ x sotorasib interaction remains positive and significant.
After the same adjustment, BRCA2+ x olaparib interaction remains positive and significant.
After the same adjustment, PD-L1 x pembrolizumab interaction remains positive and significant.

analyses.code: logit objective_response ~ treatment_osimertinib * egfr_mutation + ecog_ps + stage_iv + has_brain_mets + age_years + sex_female + albumin_g_dl + ldh_u_l + nlr + crp_mg_l
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction treatment_osimertinib:egfr_mutation log-OR=0.0288, Wald p=0.714.

analyses.code: logit objective_response ~ treatment_sotorasib * kras_g12c + ecog_ps + stage_iv + has_brain_mets + age_years + sex_female + albumin_g_dl + ldh_u_l + nlr + crp_mg_l
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction treatment_sotorasib:kras_g12c log-OR=0.0632, Wald p=0.4.

analyses.code: logit objective_response ~ treatment_olaparib * brca2_mutation + ecog_ps + stage_iv + has_brain_mets + age_years + sex_female + albumin_g_dl + ldh_u_l + nlr + crp_mg_l
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction treatment_olaparib:brca2_mutation log-OR=-0.1553, Wald p=0.342.

analyses.code: logit objective_response ~ treatment_pembrolizumab * pdl1_tps + ecog_ps + stage_iv + has_brain_mets + age_years + sex_female + albumin_g_dl + ldh_u_l + nlr + crp_mg_l
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction treatment_pembrolizumab:pdl1_tps log-OR=0.5996, Wald p=1.27e-07.

proposed_hypotheses.text: There is a positive 3-way interaction (treatment_pembrolizumab x tmb_high x pdl1_tps) on objective_response, indicating that pembrolizumab benefit is greatest when both pdl1 and tmb are favorable.
In ecog_ps=2 patients, pembrolizumab benefit is smaller than in ecog_ps=0 patients (negative interaction).
Among low PD-L1 (pdl1_tps<0.01) patients, pembrolizumab has no benefit on objective_response.
alk_fusion=1 patients have higher objective_response than alk_fusion=0 patients (refines h11.1).
ros1_fusion=1 patients have different objective_response than ros1_fusion=0 patients.
braf_v600e=1 patients have different objective_response than braf_v600e=0 patients.
met_exon14_skipping=1 patients have different objective_response than met_exon14_skipping=0.
ret_fusion=1 patients have different objective_response than ret_fusion=0.
ntrk_fusion=1 patients have different objective_response than ntrk_fusion=0.
her2_amplification=1 patients have different objective_response than her2_amplification=0.
Higher cea_ng_ml is associated with lower objective_response.
Higher ca_125_u_ml is associated with lower objective_response.
psa_ng_ml is not associated with objective_response (cohort is NSCLC).
None of the genotyped SNPs (snp_*) is individually associated with objective_response after Bonferroni correction.
snp_rs1045642 is not associated with objective_response in the unadjusted univariable test.
snp_rs429358 is not associated with objective_response in the unadjusted univariable test.

analyses.code: univariable logit per snp_* with Bonferroni
analyses.result_summary: 23 SNPs tested. Bonferroni threshold 0.00217. Min raw p=0.0182. SNPs passing Bonferroni: 0.
snp_rs1045642 log-OR per allele/dose = 0.0031, raw p=0.896.
snp_rs429358 log-OR per allele/dose = 0.0129, raw p=0.696.

proposed_hypotheses.text: There is an interaction between treatment_pembrolizumab and squamous histology on objective_response.
There is a negative interaction between treatment_pembrolizumab and liver_mets on objective_response.
There is a negative interaction between treatment_pembrolizumab and has_brain_mets on objective_response.

In a comprehensive multivariable logistic regression including all four treatments, key biomarker interactions, and clinical covariates, the treatment_osimertinib:egfr_mutation interaction remains positive and significant.
In the same model, treatment_sotorasib:kras_g12c remains positive and significant.
In the same model, treatment_olaparib:brca2_mutation remains positive and significant.
In the same model, treatment_pembrolizumab:pdl1_tps remains positive and significant.
ecog_ps and stage_iv remain negatively associated with objective_response in the multivariable model.
Among EGFR-negative patients, treatment_osimertinib has no benefit on objective_response.
Among KRAS G12C-negative patients, treatment_sotorasib has no benefit on objective_response.
Among BRCA2-negative patients, treatment_olaparib has no benefit on objective_response.
Among low PD-L1 (pdl1_tps<0.01) patients, treatment_pembrolizumab has no benefit on objective_response.

analyses.result_summary: EGFR- subset (n=43483): treatment_osimertinib=1 ORR 0.1657 vs 0.1711; OR=0.962, p=0.171.
KRAS G12C- subset (n=43632): treatment_sotorasib=1 ORR 0.1687 vs 0.1690; OR=0.998, p=0.947.
BRCA2- subset (n=48481): treatment_olaparib=1 ORR 0.1706 vs 0.1686; OR=1.014, p=0.597.
pdl1_tps<0.01 subset (n=5791): treatment_pembrolizumab=1 ORR 0.1695 vs 0.1717; OR=0.984, p=0.834.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among pembrolizumab-treated patients, higher smoking_pack_years is associated with higher objective_response (consistent with TMB-driven response in smokers).
Among non-pembrolizumab patients, smoking_pack_years has no association with objective_response.
There is a positive interaction between smoking_pack_years and treatment_pembrolizumab on objective_response.
Asian race (race_ethnicity='asian') is associated with higher prevalence of egfr_mutation than non-Asian race.
After adjusting for biomarker status (egfr, kras_g12c, brca2, pdl1_tps, tmb_high), ECOG, and stage, race_ethnicity is not independently associated with objective_response.
education_years is not associated with objective_response after adjustment for ECOG and stage.

analyses.code: fisher_exact: egfr_mutation by asian vs non-asian
analyses.result_summary: Asian: EGFR rate 0.1319 vs non-Asian 0.1302; OR=1.015, p=0.779.

analyses.code: logit objective_response ~ race_ethnicity + biomarkers + ecog + stage
analyses.result_summary: LR test for race_ethnicity after adjustment p=0.0687; max log-OR diff among race coefs=0.132.
